key.name: enabled
key.summary: Whether the light bars are active.

key.name: thickness
key.summary: Deprecated: single thickness for all sides. Migrated to the per-side thickness keys.

key.name: thickness-top
key.summary: Thickness of the top border in pixels (0 disables it).

key.name: thickness-bottom
key.summary: Thickness of the bottom border in pixels (0 disables it).

key.name: thickness-left
key.summary: Thickness of the left border in pixels (0 disables it).

key.name: thickness-right
key.summary: Thickness of the right border in pixels (0 disables it).

key.name: thickness-linked
key.summary: Whether changing one side's thickness updates all sides.

key.name: opacity
key.summary: The opacity of the light bars.

key.name: color
key.summary: The color of the light bars (RGB Hex).

key.name: multi-monitor
key.summary: Whether to show the borders on all monitors.

key.name: maximize-brightness
key.summary: Whether to maximize screen brightness when active.

key.name: profiles
key.summary: Saved profiles as a JSON document.

key.name: active-profile
key.summary: ID of the last applied profile (empty for custom settings).

key.name: default-profile
key.summary: Profile applied when auto-switching and no window rule matches.

key.name: auto-switch
key.summary: Whether to switch profiles automatically based on the focused window.

key.name: settings-version
key.summary: Internal settings format version, used for migrations.
